basic_details.job_title: Govt ITI Balod Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Government Industrial Training Institute Balod (Govt ITI Balod)
basic_details.short_information: Government Industrial Training Institute Balod (Govt ITI Balod) has published the Guest Lecturer Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 Guest Lecturer positions on a contractual basis. Candidates aged 18 years and above, possessing qualifications such as 10th pass or equivalent, NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT, valid LMV driving license (for Driver cum Mechanic and Mechanic Diesel), or BCA/PGDCA (for COPA), are eligible to apply offline. Interested candidates can submit their applications by 19 June 2026, with direct links to the official notification provided bel

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th pass or equivalent, NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT, Valid LMV driving licence (for Driver cum Mechanic and Mechanic Diesel), BCA/PGDCA or equivalent (for COPA)
qualification.details: Electrician: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT or equivalent degree. Machinist: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT or equivalent degree. Driver cum Mechanic: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT + valid LMV driving licence. Mechanic Diesel: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT + valid LMV driving licence. Workshop Calculation & Engineering Drawing: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT or equivalent degree. COPA: 10th pass or equivalent + NTC/NAC/ITI in relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT or BCA/PGDCA or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 140 per hour (maximum 5 hours per day, with a maximum monthly salary of Rs. 15000).

selection_process: Merit List based on technical qualification marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.balod.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Govt ITI Balod Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Govt ITI Balod Guest Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Lecturer posts at Government Industrial Training Institute Balod is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Lecturer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Guest Lecturer position at Government Industrial Training Institute Balod.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Guest Lecturer posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 140 per hour, with a maximum of 5 hours per day, and a monthly cap of Rs. 15000.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the COPA post?
faq.answer: For the COPA post, candidates need to have passed 10th or equivalent, along with NTC/NAC/ITI in the relevant trade from NCVT/SCVT, or a BCA/PGDCA or equivalent degree.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Guest Lecturer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a merit list based on technical qualification marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Government Industrial Training Institute Balod, which is www.balod.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding this recruitment is www.balod.gov.in.
